longDescription: Discover Postbus ticket between Chur and Bellinzona in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Postbus
subcategory.description: Find your Postbus ticket here for a special journey through Switzerland. The yellow Postbuses travel over steep and narrow mountain roads as well as through densely populated areas. They are particularly well known for traveling to remote villages. This means that a Postbus ride is often very scenic. Postbus trips over the magnificent Swiss mountain passes are particularly popular. This even includes a 4-pass journey over the Grimsel, the Nufenen, the Gotthard and the Susten, covering more than 10,366 meters in altitude.

providers.name: SwissActivities

gallery.alternativeText: PostBus travels through nature with flowers and mountains in the background during summer.
Postbus Station Chur: modern stop with yellow buses and architectural design
Chur: picturesque old town in central Switzerland with historic buildings and mountains in the background.
Splügen: picturesque serpentine road through the mountains with stunning nature
Splügen: impressive mountain landscape with green meadows and snow-capped peaks.
Misox: picturesque view of green valleys and mountains in summer
Misox: impressive landscape with mountains and valley in summer, ideal for hiking and exploring
Bellinzona: impressive fortress complex surrounded by mountains and city, ideal for exploration and culture.
